name: Agency Group — OLX Imóveis Off-Market Scraper
description: Scrapes OLX.pt imóveis section for motivated sellers: large properties, price drops, long listed

fields.urgency: string — high if price low per m2 or urgent keywords in title

target_signals.description: OLX signals that indicate motivated seller
indicators: Title contains: urgente, venda rápida, oportunidade, necessito vender
Listed > 60 days with no price change
Price significantly below zone average (AVM comparison)
Herança or bank-owned mentions in description

schedule_description: Run daily at 07:00 — before Idealista scrape completes, staggered
